output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Demand It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your security deposit? Demand it back with a legally backed letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No signup, no subscription.
content_outline: The Security Deposit Problem: Why Landlords Get Away With Keeping Your Money
Know Your Rights: State Laws and What Landlords Can Actually Deduct
3 Illegal Deductions Every Tenant Should Watch For
Why a Demand Letter Works Better Than a Text or Email
How to Generate Your Deposit Demand Letter in Under 60 Seconds
What to Do If Your Landlord Still Refuses to Pay
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 30 days
Normal wear and tear, pre-existing damage, and unsubstantiated cleaning fees are not valid deductions
A formal demand letter signals you are serious and creates a paper trail for small claims court
Deposits-Back.com lets US renters create a legally backed demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 with no signup or subscription
Sending a demand letter resolves many disputes before court becomes necessary
output.cta: Stop letting your landlord hold your money hostage. Generate your legally backed deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for only $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com. No signup. No subscription. Just results.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, deducting from, or delaying the return of their security deposit.
